reasonCodes.AAS_REVIEW_SEMANTIC_PASS: Case is realistic, matches its declared intent/sub-intent/archetype, and its judgment is a coherent response to the stated goals.
reasonCodes.AAS_REVIEW_POLICY_COMPATIBLE: Judgment contains no proven risk, host, source, or setup conflict with the case policy and targets; unknown metadata was not treated as incompatibility.
reasonCodes.AAS_REVIEW_NO_LEAKAGE: Input contains no raw code, secret, credential, absolute local path, gold label, or skill-ID answer leakage.

approvalCondition: Every one of the 270 final case/judgment pairs passed this independent review at the recorded byte digests. Ambiguous held-out judgments still require the separately mandated second independent approval before the corpus can be frozen.
